## Shipping check

- [ ] The complete code diff was compared with public docs and internal docs.
- [ ] Stable external behavior is documented on `docs.bapx.in`.
- [ ] Implementation and incomplete wiring are documented in `internal-docs/`.
- [ ] No documentation claims an unimplemented endpoint, button, or workflow is working.
